prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is High-voltage safety, part of the Automotive & Powertrain scope. The observed field condition is: orange cable handling violations. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: OEM HV procedures, NFPA 70E-adjacent.
title: Compliance check: High-voltage safety (service call)
